Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant W.R. Chamberline and Co.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole M. Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lisa Koszalka, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Bruce Waygood, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant W.R. Chamberline & Co.
Default was entered against defendant on July 13, 2015.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on July 13, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lisa Koszalka, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Bruce Waygood, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendant W.R. Chamberlin and Co., as follows:

Economic Damages: $2,413.77.
Non-Economic Damages - $500,000.00.
Total - $502,413.77.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
